tasks.title: Set up Supabase project & migrations
tasks.description: Create Supabase project, configure database schema with tables for users, rooms, player_positions. Run initial migrations for MVP.

tasks.title: Implement Auth integration
tasks.description: Integrate Supabase Auth for user authentication. Support email/magic links for MVP.
acceptance_criteria: Users can sign up and log in
User profile created in database on first login

tasks.title: Set up Socket.io server
tasks.description: Create Node.js server with Socket.io for real-time player position synchronization using authoritative server model.
acceptance_criteria: Socket.io server running on configured port
Client can connect and receive world state
World state broadcast to all clients every 100ms

tasks.title: Implement player movement sync
tasks.description: Phaser 3 player movement with WASD/Arrow keys, grid-snapped (32x32), synced to server and broadcast to all clients.
acceptance_criteria: Position synced to server in real-time
Other players visible and smoothly interpolated
Ghost mode (G key) working with 0.5 opacity

tasks.title: Add proximity detection
tasks.description: Implement Euclidean distance calculation for triggering proximity events when players are within 200px.

tasks.title: Integrate LiveKit for spatial audio
tasks.description: Connect LiveKit for spatial audio/video. Players within 200px radius get audio streams with logarithmic attenuation and stereo panning.
acceptance_criteria: LiveKit room created for each game room
Stereo panning based on relative X position
Media tracks cleaned up when leaving proximity

tasks.title: Create map collision system
tasks.description: Implement collision detection using Tiled JSON map layers. Validate player movements against collision layer.
acceptance_criteria: Tiled JSON map loaded in Phaser
Player cannot walk through solid tiles

tasks.title: Review Supabase schema
tasks.description: Review database schema design for efficiency, proper indexing, and future scalability. Check realtime configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Proper indexes on frequently queried columns
No security vulnerabilities in RLS policies
